briefdescription.para: The entry point for showing the XCanPs driver in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: The example configures the device for internal loop back mode, then sends a Can frame, receives the same Can frame, and verifies the frame contents.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful, otherwise driver-specific error code.

- In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.
If the device is not working correctly, this function may enter an infinite loop and will never return to the caller.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the driver instance
XST_SUCCESS if successful, a driver-specific return code if not.
This function waits until TX FIFO has room for at least one frame before sending a frame. So this function may block if the hardware is not built correctly.

briefdescription.para: This function receives a frame and verifies its contents.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the driver instance.
XST_SUCCESS if successful, a driver-specific return code if not.
This function waits until RX FIFO becomes not empty before reading a frame from it. So this function may block if the hardware is not built correctly.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the Can polled example.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the example has completed successfully.
XST_FAILURE if the example has failed.

briefdescription.para: Contains an example of how to use the XCanPs driver directly.

detaileddescription.para: This example shows the using the driver/device in polled mode.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a xd/sv 01/12/10 First release 2.1 adk 23/08/14 Fixed CR:798792 Peripheral test for CANPS IP in SDK claims a 40kbps baud rate but it's not. 3.7 ht 06/28/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. ht 07/10/23 Added support for peripheral test in SDT flow. 3.8 rma 01/12/23 Update example code to fix compilation warnings. 3.8 ht 01/19/24 Update example to fix peripheral test compilation warnings and example compilation failure in SDT flow 3.12 vlt 12/17/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
